empty.title: No skills yet
empty.body: Import a skill from a file, a URL, or the community catalog.

selectPrompt.title: Select a skill
selectPrompt.body: Pick a skill on the left to preview its body.

drawer.title: Import a skill
drawer.subtitle: Pick a Markdown file or a zip archive; the skill core is extracted server-side.
drawer.name: Name

file.nameHint: Optional — derived from the first heading if blank.
file.bodyHint: Pasted content is wrapped as untrusted data — never executed as instructions.

url.label: Skill URL
url.hint: Fetched server-side, stored as untrusted, and left disabled until vetted.
url.success: Imported "{name}". Disabled until you vet + enable it.

listItem.agentCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 agents} one {# agent} other {# agents}}

preview.untrustedNotice: This skill came from an untrusted source. Its body is stored as data (delimiter-wrapped) and must be vetted before it is enabled for an agent.
preview.bodyHint: Saving a changed body creates a new immutable version.
preview.title: Preview
preview.subtitle: Rendered as the reviewing agent receives it.

config.title: Configuration
config.name: Name
config.descriptionHint: A short directive describing what this skill instructs the reviewing agent to do.
config.bodyHint: Injected verbatim into the agent's prompt when this skill is linked and enabled.
config.summaryHint: Optional one-line note saved as this version's title.

stats.agentsEmpty: No agents link this skill yet.

versions.title: Version history
versions.sub: Every body change is stored as an immutable version, so any review is reproducible.
versions.restoredToast: Restored v{version} as a new version.
versions.diffSubtitle: Lines added (green) or removed (red) relative to the current body.

evals.stub: Evals arrive in a later lesson.

context.title: Project context to use
context.inheritCopy: Any agent using this skill inherits these documents.
context.orderHint: Order matters — earlier docs appear earlier in the assembled prompt. Toggle to attach.
context.serializesEmpty: No docs attached — nothing is added to the prompt.

create.title: Create a skill
create.subtitle: Write a skill from scratch. It is enabled by default.
create.name: Name
create.descriptionPlaceholder: What this skill instructs the agent to do
